contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Looking through the proposal and have feedbacks on the logistics side 
  
  Saw the designs. They look really beautiful
  
  I think supply chain wise, if the package production could be handled in China side (_we are currently using China side as as well for our package production_) then shipped to one of our community member warehouse in Brazil. 
  
  Then we can start producing the chocolate bars there.
  
  Right now we have around 275 kilograms of cacao beans sitting in the warehouse. 
  
  Next time we stock more beans is this coming August period when I go visit the farms. Glad to have you join me there if you are keen 
  
  Conversion from beans to 100% bar is usually around 0.77 in terms of kilograms.
  
  Single origin means traceable to the country 
  
  Perhaps use single estate since it’s traceable directly to the farm itself 
  
  It’s considered a tier above single origin.
  
  Should consider leaving a space for us to paste the unique QR code  so that the bars provenance is traceable
  
  Includes lab test of the shipment, story of the farm itself, taste profile as well as other media properties associated with the bar.
  
  To ensure against excessive waiting time we might need to preload and pre-stock inventory in USA side 
  
  https://dapp.truesight.me/shipping_planner.html
  
  Allows for estimates of freight cost from Brazil to USA for the assembled bars.
  
  Two years ago, we did the end to end testing where the packaging material was produced in Shenzhen China and then shipped out of our community member’s address in Brazil 
  
  I think import tax on the Brazilian side for bringing in packaging materials is around 80% if I don’t remember wrongly
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: Aora_x_Agroverse Proposal.pdf
- Destination Contribution File Location: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/.github/tree/main/assets/contribution_20260425010101_gary_teh_aora_x_agroverse_proposal.pdf
--------

My Digital Signature: 

Request Transaction ID:

rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
